title: Christmas Dog Toy Plush With Tug Rope 28cm (Reindeer)
features: Christmas Dog Toys Plush and Rope
This festive Christmas dog toy is the perfect blend of fun and comfort for your furry friend.
Crafted from soft, cuddly plush material, it features an internal squeaker and crinkle that will keep your dog engaged and entertained for hours on end.
The vibrant red rope adds an extra element of play, making it ideal for tugging and fetching games.
Measuring approximately 18cm x 11cm, with a rope section size of about 10cm x 1.5cm (Giving an oversall size of 28cm), this toy is perfectly sized for small to medium dogs,
The delightful character design not only serves as a playful companion but also brings a touch of holiday cheer to your pet's toy collection.
Treat your dog to this charming toy and watch them enjoy endless festive fun!
